About Owners HQ

We have one goal, helping holiday home owners keep more of their rental income.

To do this we use a mix of modern technology and an ultra-lean business model that allows us to massively reduce costs for holiday home owners like you.

Who are we?

Darren Atkinson

We are an ultra-small, ultra-focussed, and independent team led by myself, Darren Atkinson.

My background is in technology and Internet marketing, I founded and run a successful ecommerce for over 15 years, and I've also been involved in the holiday rental business for over 12 years now.

At Owners HQ we don't have a set of investors looking for a continuously increasing return, this allows us to run a profitable business without needing to claim an ever-increasing slice of your rental income.

Our team may be small but we are efficient, and we use the latest tech advances to massively reduce the cost of developing and supplying money and time saving solutions to holiday home owners.

Learn more about our backstory here.

Listing Websites

Home owners looking to rent out their property need guests, listing websites like AirBnB and VRBO can supply enquiries and guests.

The main issue with these large listing sites is that they demand an always increasing slice of your rental income.

Many home owners have become too reliant on them for bookings despite thinking that being charged 15% - 20% of their income for an advert is unfair.

Our Solution: We have our own listing websites, these have been running for over 10 years and receive thousands of views each month. Collectively they have driven thousands of bookings for holiday home owners.

Instead of claiming a percentage of your income we simply charge a low annual fee, no commissions, no guest fees, and no nasty surprises.

Learn more about our listing websites here.

The Future

Our listing websites will genuinely save our customers thousands of pounds per year, but they are just the start.

Over the longer term I believe holiday home owners need to become more independent and take greater control over their properties and guests if they want to survive and thrive.

Our focus is on building the tools that will enable this.

Look out for more on this soon.
